overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a red-haired character walking through a foggy, neon-lit Night City at night. The character traverses from a street corner across a crosswalk, along an industrial waterfront path, and into a bustling commercial district with bright neon signs and moderate traffic.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
transitioning from asphalt road to concrete waterfront walkway

agents.ego_description: red-haired character walks from street corner across the crosswalk toward the waterfront industrial area

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals at the street corner
bright overhead street light illuminating the foggy intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
futuristic skyscrapers with glowing windows visible through the fog
rain-slicked dark asphalt reflecting street lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a foggy urban street corner at night. The red-haired character crosses a wet asphalt road marked with crosswalk lines, passing under a bright street lamp. In the distance, futuristic megatowers rise through the haze as the character transitions from the street onto a concrete waterfront walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront walkway with safety barriers

events.description: entering industrial waterfront area with yellow-black striped safety barriers
bridge overpass structure temporarily obscures view of distant towers

agents.ego_description: character walks along the concrete pier path with industrial barriers on both sides, heading toward the distant city lights

entered.detail: yellow and black striped concrete safety barriers lining the walkway
elevated highway or rail bridge spanning across the waterfront
metal guardrail along the edge of the water

segments.scene_description: The character moves along an industrial waterfront walkway lined with yellow-black striped barriers. An elevated bridge overpass spans overhead while the path continues toward distant megatowers glowing through the fog. The environment is devoid of other people, creating a solitary atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and storefronts

events.description: bright neon signs become prominent including pink 'Jacked and Coke' sign
vehicles with headlights on begin passing along the adjacent multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: character walks along the sidewalk approaching commercial buildings with bright neon signs and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and dark skirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign reading 'Jacked and Coke' on building facade
dark multi-story building with illuminated windows and advertisements
large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a commercial district as the character approaches buildings adorned with bright neon signage. The famous 'Jacked and Coke' neon sign glows pink on the right, while digital billboards illuminate the fog. Other pedestrians appear, walking in the opposite direction, and sparse traffic begins moving along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with heavy advertising and traffic

events.description: camera passes pedestrian walking in opposite direction on the narrow sidewalk
slight adjustment to path to navigate around oncoming pedestrians

agents.ego_description: character continues along the busy sidewalk passing multiple pedestrians while observing the moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: silver sedan with headlights on driving along the wet street

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screens displaying advertisements high on building walls
cars and trucks with headlights illuminated driving along the multi-lane road
tall modern street lights with bright white LED illumination

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a bustling commercial sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic walking in the opposite direction. Large digital billboards tower overhead on the right, displaying bright advertisements that reflect off the wet pavement. Vehicles pass by on the adjacent road, their headlights cutting through the foggy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban walkway with digital billboards overhead

events.description: passing pedestrian briefly blocks view of the street and traffic

agents.ego_description: character walks along the elevated path passing oncoming pedestrians in the foggy neon-lit night

notable_agents.action: man in vest and jeans walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: low concrete walls with blue paint lining the edge of the elevated walkway
dedicated bicycle path marked with red pavement between sidewalk and road

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing along an elevated walkway with concrete barriers on the left and a red bike lane marking the edge of the sidewalk. Digital billboards continue to glow in the distance while sparse pedestrians walk toward the camera. The foggy atmosphere persists, with street lights creating halos in the mist as the journey continues through the neon-lit city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy urban landscape that transforms from a solitary industrial waterfront into a bustling, neon-lit commercial district. It begins at a foggy street corner where a red-haired character crosses a wet asphalt road under a bright street lamp, moving toward distant megatowers as they transition onto a concrete waterfront walkway. As the character proceeds along this industrial path lined with striped barriers and an overhead bridge, the solitary atmosphere shifts when the scene opens into a commercial area adorned with glowing pink neon signs and digital billboards. The environment then expands into a crowded sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic and vehicles whose headlights cut through the mist, reflecting off the wet pavement. Finally, the camera follows the character onto an elevated walkway with a red bike lane, moving deeper into the city as street lights create halos in the persistent fog.
